sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Purple blocks at rows 7-10, cols 14-16, 20-22, 26-28
# Centers: (8, 15), (8, 21), (8, 27) or (9, 15), (9, 21), (9, 27)

result = action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 8, 'col': 15},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 8, 'col': 21},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 8, 'col': 27}
])
print(f"Result: {result}")
print(f"Game over: {result.get('game_over', False)}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Check state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
from collections import Counter
color_counts = Counter(n['color'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['pixels'] > 3)
print(f"Colors: {dict(color_counts)}")

# Check for remaining purple blocks
p_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
print(f"P blocks remaining: {len(p_blocks)}")
for pb in p_blocks:
    print(f"  pixels={pb['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(p[0] for p in pb['boundary'])},{min(p[1] for p in pb['boundary'])}]-[{max(p[0] for p in pb['boundary'])},{max(p[1] for p in pb['boundary'])}]")

# Check sky blue
sky_blue = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S']
print(f"Sky blue objects: {len(sky_blue)}, total pixels: {sum(n['pixels'] for n in sky_blue)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
